posts.text:
When we stand for the American flag, we are not standing for politicians or parties. We are standing for the brave men and women in uniform who serve and who have served this nation.

Our veterans deserve every promise kept. The best health care. The strongest benefits. The full support and resources of the country they defended. They earned it through service, sacrifice, and courage. We owe them nothing less.

Video

We spoke this week at the Low Country Retired Law Enforcement Officers Association meeting in Bluffton. We were able to meet and speak with many of our community’s heroes.

Decades of service. A lifetime of sacrifice. Every single one of them deserving of our deepest respect and appreciation.

These are the brave men and women who make South Carolina STRONG.

The government has locked people up for decades with far less evidence than what exists in the Epstein case. 

Ask yourself why.

We cosponsored @RepGusBilirakis’ Major Richard Star Act because our combat veterans are being robbed. Not by foreign enemies. By their own government.

If you were wounded in combat, retired from service, and collect VA disability compensation, Washington has been quietly docking your retirement check every single month. Thousands of disabled military retirees watch Washington claw back their retirement pay because they collected the VA disability benefits they bled for.

Two benefits earned thr

It has now been OVER a month since we wrote to the United States Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York.

Still no answer.

We simply requested access to the unredacted memo on the investigation into Jeffrey Epstein’s co-conspirators. The DOJ claims the memos came to them already redacted from the SDNY.

If so, what are they hiding? Why won’t they answer us? WHO are they protecting?

We won’t be letting this go anytime soon.

Since 1915, Parris Island has been making Marines.

One hundred and ten years of sweat, sacrifice, and service to this nation. Countless warriors have been forged right here in the Lowcountry.

We introduced the Parris Island Protection Act to ensure that no federal dollars are ever used to close or realign Marine Corps Recruit Depot Parris Island.

Parris Island does not just belong to South Carolina. It belongs in the soul of the American military, training generations of Marines to come.

And

Attorney General Pam Bondi's Oversight briefing does not end the Epstein investigation. It doesn't even slow it down. 

The American people deserve a full accounting of Jeffrey Epstein's criminal network, the rich and powerful  who used it, and the institutions that protected them. The Oversight Committee moved to subpoena the Attorney General. My subpoena still stands. 

I am not backing down. Not even a little bit.

HOLD THE LINE.

Our office met with George Roberts, President of Meals on Wheels-Feeding Friends.

They serve anyone who is homebound and cannot prepare a meal for themselves, regardless of age or income. Organizations like this fill the gaps no government program ever could, with compassion and commitment to their communities.

South Carolina STRONG.

Name one case besides the Epstein network where this much evidence existed and so few arrests were made. 

We’ll wait.

We need to be as committed to saving America, as the Left is to destroying it.

PASS THE SAVE AMERICA ACT.

What started as a trip to bring a South Carolina family home turned into a full-scale rescue mission after we met Bryan Stern and the Grey Bull Rescue team.

We could not turn away from what we saw. Working with the Department of Homeland Security and Department of State, we secured a plane and brought 155 Americans home.

Thousands more are still stuck in the Middle East. We need more planes to bring them home safely.

Video

Our Modernizing Government Technology Reform Act brings Washington's outdated IT systems into the 21st century. For too long, the federal government has relied on obsolete technology wasting taxpayer dollars and creating security risks. This bill brings real accountability, exposes outdated systems, and ensures agencies modernize their technology.

Video

The survivors of Jeffrey Epstein's trafficking network have been waiting for justice for over 20 years. 

Thousands of victims do not happen with one accomplice. But the monsters who destroyed their lives have never faced accountability. Just silence, delays, and a system more interested in protecting the powerful than the victims. 

We are STILL waiting. Justice is long overdue.

I remain opposed to U.S. troops on the ground in Iran.
Community note: Rep. Mace voted against the War Powers resolution which would have prevented the President from ordering a ground invasion of Iran

congress.gov/bill/119th-con…

Bringing our people home from the Middle East is a moment we will never forget.

THIS is South Carolina STRONG.

There's a difference between right and wrong. Every one knows this is wrong and few have spoken up. 

Rand Paul had to have part of his lung removed after he was assaulted. Unreal we would promote someone who advertises violence as the answer when they have a political disagreement.


Senator Rand Paul (@SenRandPaul)

"So, today, Markwayne Mullin, I’ll give you a chance. Tell it to my face. Tell the world why you believe I deserved to be assaulted from behind, have six ribs broken, and a damaged

We introduced the Veterans for Mustangs Act to promote humane wild horse management while creating new opportunities for military veterans.

The bill prioritizes hiring and training U.S. veterans to help administer on-range fertility control programs for wild horse populations. Our veterans have the skills, discipline, and commitment these efforts demand.

Supporting our veterans means creating meaningful opportunities when they return home, not empty promises.
